package rulecoverage

func PositiveMutablePackageGlobal() string {
    ruleID := "mutable_package_global"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Package-level variables that are mutated from function bodies instead of kept immutable."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
